payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark polished wooden bed with a paneled rectangular headboard, covered by beige-and-gray horizontal striped sheets and two matching pillows; the crop is edge-cropped showing the mattress top and part of the headboard in a near-camera view, estimated distance ~1.0 m.
